---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: '[feature] '
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what's missing or awkward today?

## Proposed solution

What would you like to see? (CLI shape, config key, routing behavior, etc.)

## Alternatives considered

Any workarounds or other approaches.

## Additional context

Examples of prompts and the routing you'd expect are especially helpful.
